metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  # Handle crew information if present
          crew_parts = []
          if crew_info["commander"]:
              crew_parts.append(f"commander {crew_info['commander'][0]}")
          if crew_info["backuppilot"]:
              crew_parts.append(f"backup pilot {crew_info['backuppilot'][0]}")
          if crew_info["crewmembers"]:
              crew_members = ", ".join(crew_info["crewmembers"])
              crew_parts.append(f"crew members {crew_members}")
  
          if crew_parts:
              parts.append(f"{subj} had " + ", ".join(crew_parts))
with:
  # Handle crew information if present – generate sentences with the person as subject
          crew_sentences = []
          if crew_info["commander"]:
              obj = crew_info["commander"][0]
              crew_sentences.append(f"{obj} was the commander of {subj}")
          if crew_info["backuppilot"]:
              obj = crew_info["backuppilot"][0]
              crew_sentences.append(f"{obj} was the backup pilot of {subj}")
          if crew_info["crewmembers"]:
              objs = ", ".join(crew_info["crewmembers"])
              crew_sentences.append(f"The crew members of {subj} were {objs}")
  
          if crew_sentences:
              # Add each crew sentence as a separate clause
              parts.extend(crew_sentences)
